description: Reusable visual_spec templates for math-visual-designer and web-ui-builder. Merge preset into each visual_specs.json entry; set theme_id to pick palette.

presets.label: 2D vector field
presets.pedagogy: Show direction and magnitude over a plane; good for flows, gradients, dynamics.
presets.manim_hint: ArrowVectorField or VectorField from manim; use theme accent for vectors, muted grid.
presets.jupyter_hint: quiver on np.meshgrid; equal aspect; series_colors[0] for arrows.

presets.label: Concept graph
presets.pedagogy: Prerequisite / uses / extends structure from concept_graph.json.
presets.manim_hint: GraphScene or NetworkMobject-style layout; fade in by topological wave.
presets.jupyter_hint: networkx + matplotlib; node color from theme series_colors.

presets.label: Probability / simplex
presets.pedagogy: 3-class or n-simplex intuition; Bayesian updates as motion inside simplex.
presets.manim_hint: Triangle in 2D or tetra wireframe in 3D; dot for posterior.
presets.jupyter_hint: 2D simplex with plt.fill; trajectory as line.

presets.label: Latent manifold sketch
presets.pedagogy: Surface or 2D embedding with observation arrows; VAE/GAN/world-model intros.

presets.label: Loss landscape (toy)
presets.pedagogy: Convex vs non-convex intuition; SGD noise optional.
presets.manim_hint: Surface + moving point; camera orbit slow.

presets.label: ReAct / agent loop
presets.pedagogy: Observation → thought → action timeline; tool calls as branches.
presets.manim_hint: Succession of rectangles + arrows; color code phase with theme accent.

presets.label: Circuit / netlist graph
presets.manim_hint: Build module blocks as rectangles; animated signal flow along edges.
presets.jupyter_hint: networkx with custom node shapes or SVG export.

presets.label: RAG index layers
presets.pedagogy: Corpus → chunks → embeddings → retriever → context window.

presets.label: Bloch / qubit state
presets.pedagogy: Quantum state as vector on sphere; rotations as paths.

presets.label: Attention heatmap
presets.manim_hint: ImageMobject from array; highlight row/col sweep.
presets.jupyter_hint: imshow with vmin/vmax; theme-aware colormap from series_colors.

presets.label: World model rollout
presets.pedagogy: Latent state x_t, action a_t, predicted x_{t+1}; MPC slice.
presets.manim_hint: Time axis + latent blobs fanning out.
presets.jupyter_hint: Ribbon plot or step-wise subplot grid.

presets.label: Equation term highlight
presets.pedagogy: Sync term-by-term with color and motion (3b1b style).
presets.manim_hint: MathTex with indices; IndicateThenFade or SurroundingRectangle per term.
presets.jupyter_hint: IPython.display with manual HTML+CSS or Manim render to GIF.
